name: Almond Crumble Topping
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, sugar, and nutmeg in a mixing bowl; stir well to mix.
2. Stir in the sliced almonds.
3. Mix in the melted butter evenly. Set aside for 5 minutes.
4. Using your fingertips, break the mixture into 1/4 to 1/2 inch crumbs.
5. Set aside again while you prepare the filling for Blueberry Lattice Pie.
